subcodes.first_line: O ye who have turned your faces toward the Exalted Beauty! By night, by day, at morningtide and sunset
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متوجهین بمنظر اعلی در لیل و نهار و صباح و مساء و عشی و ضحی در عوالم قلب
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @sacrifice of the Manifestation of God redeems the world, @unity; oneness of humanity, @call to action, @unity in diversity
